messages.content:
Bot2 <Event>: I have picked up:
- 1 Stone Sword
- 1 Bow
- 24 Arrow
- 1 Leather Tunic
- 12 Bread
- 40 Oak Planks
I notice I have a Leather Tunic in my inventory. Since there are no immediate threats, I should prepare by equipping it now so I'm ready for the next wave of hostiles.
Me <EQUIPPED GEAR>: Equipped Leather Tunic to torso.

Bot2 <Event>: Multiple new hostile mobs are approaching:
- zombie id 15 is 4.4 blocks away
- zombie id 16 is 8.6 blocks away
Hostiles incoming. Switching to ranged to pick off the closest threat before it closes the gap.
Me <EQUIPPED>: Now holding Bow.
Me <BOW ATTACK>: Attacking 15 with a bow.

Bot2 <Event>: The following hostile mobs are no longer a threat:
- zombie id 16

I used or lost:
- 2 Arrow
That leaves only zombie 15 (if it's still standing). My bow attack should be wrapping it up, so I'll hold position and stay ready for the next wave.
Me <IDLE>: Chose not to act.

Bot2 <Event>: The following hostile mobs are no longer a threat:
- zombie id 15

I used or lost:
- 1 Arrow
Both hostiles down. Equipping melee so I’m ready for the next close-quarters engagement.
Me <EQUIPPED>: Now holding Stone Sword.

Bot2 <Event>: Multiple new hostile mobs are approaching:
- zombie id 20 is 4.1 blocks away
- zombie id 21 is 4.2 blocks away
- zombie id 22 is 4.0 blocks away
- zombie id 23 is 4.0 blocks away
Swarmed — four at close range. Engaging the nearest immediately with melee before they surround me.
Me <ATTACKING>: Engaging zombie until it is no longer a threat.

Bot2 <Event>: The following hostile mobs are no longer a threat:
- zombie id 20
- zombie id 21
- zombie id 22
Three down, one left. Maintaining pressure on the last zombie now.
Me <ATTACKING>: Engaging zombie until it is no longer a threat.

Bot2 <Event>: A new hostile mob is approaching:
- zombie id 20 is 16.0 blocks away
New target spotted at range — finishing off my current engagement first before it closes.
Me <IDLE>: Chose not to act.

Bot2 <Event>: The following hostile mobs are no longer a threat:
- zombie id 23
Switching to bow to pick off the lone straggler before it gets close.
Me <EQUIPPED>: Now holding Bow.
Me <BOW ATTACK>: Attacking 20 with a bow.

Bot2 <Event>: The following hostile mobs are no longer a threat:
- zombie id 20

I used or lost:
- 3 Arrow
Hostile down, 18 arrows left. Returning to stone sword to stay ready for the next wave.
Me <EQUIPPED>: Now holding Stone Sword.

Bot2 <Event>: Multiple new hostile mobs are approaching:
- zombie id 33 is 3.0 blocks away
- zombie id 34 is 3.4 blocks away

Another player has died:
- Bot1
Bot1 is down. Two zombies on me inside 4 blocks — going pure melee, targeting the closest first.
Me <ATTACKING>: Engaging zombie until it is no longer a threat.

Bot2 <Event>: The following hostile mobs are no longer a threat:
- zombie id 33

I just took damage.
- Health changed from 20.0 to 8.9 (11.1 lost)
Finished one. Still holding the sword — I need to kill 34 before it lands another blow.
Me <ATTACKING>: Engaging zombie until it is no longer a threat.

Bot2 <Event>: The following hostile mobs are no longer a threat:
- zombie id 34
Cleared both. Health is low — eating bread to heal back up before the next wave spawns.
Me <EATING>: Eating bread until hunger is full.

Bot2 <Event>: Multiple new hostile mobs are approaching:
- zombie id 35 is 4.2 blocks away
- zombie id 36 is 4.2 blocks away
- zombie id 37 is 4.2 blocks away
- skeleton id 38 is 4.2 blocks away

I used or lost:
- 1 Bread
Four hostiles converging on all sides — I'm surrounded. Immediate melee to prevent flanking.
Me <ATTACKING>: Engaging zombie until it is no longer a threat.

Bot2 <Event>: The following hostile mobs are no longer a threat:
- zombie id 35

I just took damage.
- Health changed from 16.7 to 10.7 (6.0 lost)
One down, but took another hit. Still two zombies and a skeleton in melee range — keeping the sword out and finishing the next closest zombie immediately.
Me <ATTACKING>: Engaging zombie until it is no longer a threat.

Bot2 <Event>: My health is low!
- Health changed from 10.7 to 6.5 (4.2 lost)
The bread is still in my hand from eating — I need the sword back to survive this. Swapping to blade and pressing the attack.
Me <EQUIPPED>: Now holding Stone Sword.
Me <ATTACKING>: Engaging zombie until it is no longer a threat.

Bot2 <Event>: My health is low!
- Health changed from 6.5 to 0.1 (6.5 lost)
At 0.1 hearts — one hit from death. I'm breaking off the engagement and sprinting for distance. Stabilize first, fight later.
Me <MOVING>: Moving toward (50, 0, 50) with radius 1.

Bot2 <Event>: The following hostile mobs are no longer a threat:
- zombie id 36
Zombie 36 down, but I'm clinging to half a heart and my hunger is too low to regenerate. I need bread now or the next scratch kills me.
Me <EATING>: Eating bread until hunger is full.
